title: Plainclothes (InDPanda)
synopsis:
Set in 1990s Syracuse, the story follows Lucas, a young undercover officer tasked with entrapping gay men. After arresting several targets, he meets Andrew, whose presence stirs unexpected feelings. As their secret relationship deepens, Lucas struggles between professional duty and forbidden desire, while the weight of a lost letter and a haunting past converge in a fateful New Year's Eve reckoning.


Sundance Film Festival - US Dramatic Special Jury Award for Ensemble Cast. Awards winner of many LGBT film festivals.

synopsis_lang.en:
Set in 1990s Syracuse, the story follows Lucas, a young undercover officer tasked with entrapping gay men. After arresting several targets, he meets Andrew, whose presence stirs unexpected feelings. As their secret relationship deepens, Lucas struggles between professional duty and forbidden desire, while the weight of a lost letter and a haunting past converge in a fateful New Year's Eve reckoning.


Sundance Film Festival - US Dramatic Special Jury Award for Ensemble Cast. Awards winner of many LGBT film festivals.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
驚喜大發現，極限量放映。俊朗便衣警察放蛇遇上天菜的他。

 

1990年代，同志運動風起雲湧，同志認同卻仍被視為禁忌。
俊朗的便衣警察盧卡斯（湯拜夫飾），被指派負責在公廁放蛇，引誘男同性戀者暴露身分，然後逮捕對方。這個下午，盧卡斯卻意外地被目標安德魯（羅素托維飾）深深吸引。
盧卡斯在職責與慾望之間，陷入天人交戰，無法自拔。新年將至，在家庭派對上，一封不知去向的信，迫使盧卡斯直面深深埋藏的過去⋯⋯

 

辛丹斯電影節「美國劇情片類評審團特別獎最佳整體演出獎」及「提名評審團大獎」，勇奪各大同志影展重要獎項。《飢餓遊戲前傳：鳴鳥與靈蛇之歌》的湯拜夫與《眾裏尋他》的羅素托維，男上加男大銀幕擦出情慾火花。

subtitle: Chinese
